display_name: Vercel Labs Skills — Open Agent Skills CLI
description: Official Vercel Labs open agent skills CLI tool (10.2K stars). 'npx skills' installs curated skills into AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot). Registry-based: skills are fetched from the ecosystem on install. Contains: find-skills SKILL.md, full TypeScript CLI source, README (18KB) with full command reference.
author: vercel-labs
notes: This is the INSTALLER/CLI for the skills ecosystem — not a collection of skills itself. Use 'npx skills' to browse and install skills from the Vercel Labs registry into your AI agent. skills/ folder currently contains find-skills (meta-skill for discovering skills). See README.md for full CLI reference and AGENTS.md for codebase guidance.
